content: Supervisor API auth: SUPERVISOR_TOKEN env var auto-injected. Header: Authorization: Bearer {SUPERVISOR_TOKEN}. homeassistant_api: true -> HA Core at http://supervisor/core/api/ and ws://supervisor/core/websocket. hassio_api: true -> Supervisor at http://supervisor/. /services/* and /discovery/* endpoints usable without hassio_api:true. MQTT service discovery: GET /services/mqtt returns {host, port, username, password, ssl}. Add-on declares services: [mqtt:want] to consume. bashio::services 'mqtt' 'host' abstracts the API call.
